chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI First Appeal No.67 of 2023 [Aisha and others v. Standard Chartered Bank (Pakistan) Ltd. & another] Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi 1.For order on office objection/reply A 2.For hg of main case 3.For hg of CMA No.3811/23 25.04.2025. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, advocate for appellants. Mr. Muhammad Khalid Hayat, advocate for respondent No.1. O R D E R ========= MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Learned counsel for appellants submits that out of Court settlement has been reached between the parties and the bank has withdrawn execution application. Learned counsel for bank has confirmed this fact and has filed a statement along with annexures, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for appellants submits that this appeal having become infructuous may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The appeal is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
